content.en:
Terran Holy Country.

Ye Tian was cultivating as usual, and suddenly a message came, which was a piece of information passed by the people below.

"There's a new rift!"

Ye Tian showed interest.

This boundary rift is not an ordinary boundary rift, but a boundary rift between the realm of the realm of the gods and the abyss of the demon seed.

The realm of the gods and the abyss of the demon seed have been colliding, and the abyss of the demon seed has been influencing the realm of the eternal realm and the realm of the realm of the gods, thus creating a lot of projections of the demon seed abyss, but in the realm of the realm of the gods, there are very few projections of the demon seed abyss, and most of them exist in the gap of the realm.

The Boundary Crack is a special area that has gradually formed after the Demon Seed Abyss tried to invade the Realm of the Realm of the Gods and collided with the origin of the Realm of the Realms of the Realms of the Realms over a long period of time.

The gods of the realm of the realm of the gods can enter the abyss of the demon seed through the rift, and the demons of the abyss of the demon seed can also enter the realm of the god kingdom through the rift.

Therefore, the gods and demons of the realm of the realm of the realm often kill in the seams of one realm after another~.

The initial rifts contain a lot of resources and treasures, which are the targets of the major forces, and when the resources are exhausted, they will become a battlefield between the gods of the realm and the demon seeds.

And this time, a new gap will appear, and it will inevitably become the target of the major forces.

"You'll have to go over and take a look, maybe you can get a lot of resources!"

Ye Tian muttered.

......

Wow!

Ye Tian quickly shuttled over, and it didn't take long for him to come to the new boundary rift location.

Canglong Mountain.

This is a place near the Canglong Blood Sect.

The Canglong Blood Sect is a medium force, but it is much stronger than the Old Sun Mountain, and it is one of the top middle forces in charge of the three Eternal Realms, just the Eternal Realm God Realm Beginner Powerhouse who condenses the three Eternal Realm spirits is enough to have three, and the Old Sun Mountain is only one.

Moreover, the number of Eternal Realm God Realms of the Canglong Blood Sect was also quite large, and the initial rank of the Eternal Realm God Realm had reached more than a dozen.

With such a scale, the Canglong Blood Sect has a great reputation in the territory of Momen, second only to Momen and several other top and medium-sized forces.

However, the Canglong Blood Sect can't occupy this boundary crack, and it doesn't have the strength to garrison this boundary crack, once the demon seed invades, the Canglong Blood Sect will be finished.

Therefore, when the Canglong Blood Sect discovered this boundary crack, it was announced as soon as possible, and it also notified Momen.

Without the support of Momen and other medium-sized forces, there is a high probability that the Canglong Blood Sect will be finished.

Therefore, no medium-sized force will dare to develop it privately when it discovers a new boundary gap.

The middle forces that wanted to monopolize the gap and developed it privately were finally destroyed.

......

Wow!

After Ye Tian came here, he saw many realm gods, all of them came from one force after another, and some even came from small forces.

There are many small forces in this area, such as the Terran Holy Country, which is also a small force in the strict sense.

Although he is very powerful and powerful, the Terran Holy Kingdom cannot meet the standard of medium power, and at least there must be three realm gods to be regarded as a medium force and be recognized by other forces.

Of course, no one really regards the Terran Holy Kingdom as a small force.

At this time, these realm gods were still waiting, and they did not immediately break into the realm rift.

After all, there will definitely be demon seeds in the cracks, and if there are many demon seeds, they will be attacked and killed inside.

This is a lesson learned countless times.

Therefore, they must wait for the middle-level powerhouses of the Eternal Realm God Realm of Momen to descend before they can enter.

Soon.

The three Eternal Realm God Realm powerhouses of Momen are here.

"I've seen the God of the Blood Yu Realm!"

"I've seen the True Boundless God!"

"I've seen the god of the Sword Xi Realm!"

A Realm God said respectfully.

The cultivation of these three realm gods has all reached the middle level of the Eternal God Realm, and among them, the Blood Yu Realm God has condensed the five Eternal Realm Spirits, and their strength is the most powerful.

The Blood Yu Realm God is also the most powerful Realm God in Momen, and he also came here this time, which shows how much attention is paid to the New Realm Gap this time.

And some of the other realm gods of Momen also came.

The Blood Yu Realm God said.

"Yes!" the gods of the realm replied.

Whoa!!

A group of realm gods flew into the rift.

As soon as he flew into the rift, an attack struck.

Rumble!!!!

A demonic seed lurked in ambush around and immediately attacked, many of them armed with weapons of terrifying eternal magic treasures.

In an instant, everything is silent.

And the Blood Yu Realm God and many other realm gods attacked together and attacked with them.

Thundered!!!!!

In an instant, the battle broke out.

Although the gods of the realm were attacked, they had been prepared for a long time, so there was nothing to do.

And the number of these ambushed demon seeds was not large, and they were quickly repulsed.

"I didn't expect these demon seeds to really come to ambush and attack!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

At first, he thought that those realm gods were too worried, but now it seems that they will really be attacked, so he has to be careful.

Subsequently.

Many of the gods of the world are scattered, ready to find resources.

For them, it's important to find the right resources for them.

The newly born New Realm Crack has a lot of resources, and it won't be long before the demon seeds come in, and they still need to ambush, and it is impossible to collect many resources.

......

Ye Tian also went alone to find resources, his purpose was treasures such as the Eternal Demon Seed and the Chilin Ancient Tree, and he was not interested in other treasures.

Of course, if he could find a treasure to assist in cultivating the Eternal Realm Spirit, he was also looking forward to it.

Soon.

He came across a demon seed, which was probably equivalent to the Eternal Realm Divine Realm that condensed two Eternal Realm spirits, and his strength was not weak.

When this demon seed saw Ye Tian, he didn't hesitate at all, and directly killed him.

And Ye Tian found that the other party was actually holding a Chilin Ancient Spear, but it was not the main body of the Chilin Ancient Spear, it was just a branch.

The power of such a Chilin Ancient Spear is average, but it is not bad to collect more branches of these Chilin Ancient Spears.

In an instant, Ye Tian fought with the other party.

Poof!

Ye Tian instantly killed this demon seed and killed it.

Subsequently, Ye Tian collected the resources on his body and left.

......

"This is the Blood Vine Snake Stone!"

Ye Tian found a treasure, this thing was of high value, it helped to refine the Eternal Dao Species, it was helpful to the Eternal Realm God Realm Beginner Level, and even had a weak effect on the Eternal Realm God Realm Intermediate Rank.

The Blood Vine Snake Stone was found here, which means that there are definitely other Blood Vine Snake Stone in the vicinity.

Immediately, Ye Tian put away this piece of Blood Vine Snake Stone, and then continued to look for other Blood Vine Snake Stone.

Ye Tian searched again and again, and found other blood vine snake Lin Shi Fan.
